     the Fermi energy is     2.3077 ev

!    total energy              =   -8184.65439812 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <       0.00000001 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.29006922 Ry

     one-electron contribution = -282745.35855505 Ry
